reasoning: Issue #2 has an identical title and body to issue #1. Both describe the same problem: the /users endpoint returns a 500 Internal Server Error with a panic when the PostgreSQL connection is unreachable.
comment:
This issue appears to be a duplicate of #1, which describes the same problem — the `/users` endpoint panicking with a 500 error when the PostgreSQL connection is unavailable.

Closing in favor of the original issue. Feel free to add any additional context or findings to #1. Thank you for the report!
